Interface ITinElement

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members to control TIN elements.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3E541320-1132-11D2-92F7-444553540000")]
public interface ITinElement

Properties

HasVoidZ

Indicates whether the element contains z-less vertex.

bool HasVoidZ { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

Index

The element's index number.

int Index { get; }

int

Sample Snippet

IsEmpty

Indicates if the specified element is uninitialized.

bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsInsideDataArea

Indicates if the specified element is within the interpolation zone of the TIN.

bool IsInsideDataArea { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

IsInsideExtent[IEnvelope]

Indicates whether the element is inside the specified envelope.

bool IsInsideExtent[IEnvelope pExtent] { get; }

pExtent IEnvelope

bool

The tag value of the specified element.
